price.title: Simple, transparent pricing
price.contact_2: You can test the subscriptions and won't be charged.
price.faq_detail: Explore our comprehensive FAQ to find quick answers to common inquiries. If you need further assistance, don't hesitate to contact us for personalized help.

marketing.title: Run your dispensary smarter with
marketing.sub_title: The all-in-one cannabis retail operating system. Manage inventory, compliance, orders, and customer experience — all from one powerful console.
marketing.sub_features: Built for cannabis retail: compliance-ready, fast, and deeply integrated.
marketing.price_features: Affordable plans for every dispensary size.

right_side.deploy_on_vercel_desc: Get your dispensary live in minutes, not months.
right_side.ship_on_cloudflare_desc: Enterprise-grade uptime so your store never goes dark.
right_side.showcase_desc: State-by-state compliance tracking, automated reports, and audit-ready records — all built in.

features_grid.monorepo_desc: Manage every location, register, and employee from a single, powerful console.
features_grid.i18n_desc: Scale effortlessly across multiple storefronts with centralized control and location-level customization.
features_grid.payments_desc: Accept cash, debit, and compliant cashless payments with built-in reconciliation and reporting.
features_grid.nextauth_desc: Role-based access, full audit trails, and state compliance integrations keep you protected and inspection-ready.

people_comment.title: What Operators Are Saying
people_comment.desc: Don't just take our word for it. Here's what real dispensary operators say about Sefari.
